title: TacCorp's Trinkets!
description: A mod for all your crystalline, decorative or damage-dealing needs!
body:
![The new logo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/51dc4873f2108681abe410136698332eefc0e7f5.png)

Welcome to TacCorp's very own versatile mod, TacCorp's Trinkets! 
This is a passion project of mine that adds a plushie, new geodes, decoration blocks, and (my personal favorite) a Quartzite Hammer that allows you to slam your enemies with concussive force! And it all starts with a long overlooked material, Quartz, and Netherite itself.......... 
For more information on how this mod functions, crafting, and the features, see the Gallery tab!
